title: Breath Attack
wikitext:
[[File:Drogon Fire Breath GIF.gif|thumb|center|590px|Dragons such as [[Drogon]] can naturally breathe out fire.]]

==Summary==
Breath attacks are abilities or moves that are projected as breath from the character's mouth. There can be many types of Breath Attacks, whether it be fire, ice, energy, plasma, acid, poison, or otherwise.

==Possible Limitations==
*May be sloppy and imprecise.
*May cause the user to lose their breath or tire out.
*May be limited in range.

==Known Users==
*Various dragons from all forms of fiction.
*Kaiju such as [[Godzilla]] spew atomic breath.
*Firebenders from [[Avatar: The Last Airbender]] have the ability to breathe fire.
*[[Superman (Post-Crisis)]] and other Kryptonians possess freeze breath.
